seo.title: Home
seo.description: Taiwan BronyCon is a fan event combining creation, market, and exchange, featuring vendors, venue maps, schedules, and complete event information. We invite everyone who loves ponies and creative culture to participate.

home.subtitle: August 15, 2026

about.title: About Us
about.content: Taiwan BronyCon (TWBC) is an unofficial gathering for fans who love My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic. We combine international convention experience with local brony culture to create a special event for Taiwanese bronies. Whether it's through socialize, creation, or games, every participant can experience the spirit of "Friendship is Magic" and build deep connections with fellow Bronies.

location.title: Location
location.name: Asi Space
location.address: 10F, No. 111, Sec. 4, Sanhe Rd., Sanchong Dist., New Taipei City

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: TWBC is a convention for My Little Pony fans!
faq.q2: How many tickets are available in total?
faq.a3: Yes. However, the event is primarily intended for attendees aged 16 and above. Children under 16 may find it harder to fit in. Children under 13 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian throughout the event.
faq.q4: Will the participant's name be printed on the badge?
faq.a4: There is a blank space on the badge for you to write your own name or nickname.

posts.title: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon 2026 Project Begins!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
Hello everypony!
We are planning to hold the first-ever TWBC Taiwan BronyCon in Taipei this summer.
Our first community survey is now open, and we warmly welcome everypony to participate! (*´▽`*)

Survey:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSex0IRX2WI93OMVNNuxCp0YLPKz9dX38Uz_aiVeY5Ku5-rpSg/alreadyresponded

posts.title: Event Date and Venue Revealed!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
TWBC Taiwan BronyCon 2026
Date: August 15, 2026
Venue: AS Life Space, 10F., No.111, Sec.4, Sanhe Rd., Sanchong Dist., New Taipei City (MRT Sanhe Junior High School Station Exit 2)

We look forward to seeing everypony there and creating new memories together for Taiwan's pony community!
Registration information and more details will be announced soon.
You're also welcome to join our Discord community to chat and hang out with fellow fans. Event updates will be posted there as well!

posts.title: TWBC Registration Is Now Open!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
Thank you for your patience, everypony!

Registration for TWBC Taiwan BronyCon 2026 is officially open!
Whether this is your first convention or you're a seasoned attendee, we sincerely invite you to join us and enjoy a gathering created by and for Taiwan's pony community.

Click the link below to register now!
Registration Form (Closes July 26):
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScQfsnO2xAn2_6HeFo4kghgGDsYjoyk57KowrEsRyrBtYE0LQ/viewform

* Notes
• This is an all-ages event.
• Please refer to the registration form for detailed rules and information.

See you all at TWBC!

posts.title: TWBC Applications Are Now Open!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
Hello everypony!
Here's the latest update from TWBC Taiwan BronyCon.
Today we're excited to announce that two application categories are now open!

Vendor Applications
Want to sell your creations at the convention?
Whether it's handmade crafts, artwork, or merchandise, we'd love to have you!
Application Form:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe_AH-DG67VmJxCAm8Dt07m8IosoE765XZKukSn5AIWN-HIvQ/viewform

Community Event Applications
Want to host your own activity at TWBC?
Panels, games, workshops, and more are all welcome!
Application Form:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf1h5OaWHYf2cdqkEwWk_SWcNioLj89ilOAtr1g1sbupTPk1w/viewform

Friendly Reminder:
Available slots are limited, and all applications will be reviewed before approval.

posts.title: TWBC Event Preview!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
TWBC 2026 will officially feature an evening music party and a community sing-along session!
We're now collecting song suggestions for the sing-along.
If you love pony music, we'd love to hear your recommendations.

Song Submission Form (Official and fan-made songs are both welcome):
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSenT_SECm3wHZWBY3VyB-UZjvy8lTBBmJEqrcJJYaxKmHNouw/viewform

posts.title: Official Website Now Live!
posts.author: TWBC Taiwan BronyCon
posts.content:
The official TWBC website is now online!
After months of preparation, we're excited to officially launch the Taiwan BronyCon website.

You can now find:
✦ Ticket Information
✦ Community Event Applications
✦ Vendor Applications
✦ Volunteer Recruitment Information

More content and updates will be added soon!
Official Website:
https://twbronycon.org/

mascot.title: Mascot

thanks.title: Acknowledgements
thanks.desc: Thank every staff member, volunteer, and supporter who helped make this event possible.

introduction.title: ✦ Introduction ✦
what: Taiwan BronyCon is a community event created by fans who love My Little Pony. We believe the Magic of Friendship is not just a story, but a spirit that can be practiced in real life.
Here, you can freely express yourself and share your creations. Whether it is art, music, cosplay, or simply meeting new friends, every passion deserves to be seen.
We hope to create a warm, inclusive, and creative space where every participant can leave with wonderful memories.
special: This event will be held at Asi Space, offering approximately 200 ping of open space.
The spacious and comfortable environment allows everyone to socialize freely and enjoy a full day of activities.
Day & Night Sessions | 11 Hours of Non-Stop Celebration
From 10 AM to 9 PM, enjoy a complete experience spanning day and night.
Daytime: quizzes, pony-themed games, creative workshops, and more.
Nighttime: a DJ party and a community sing-along of everyone's favorite pony songs.
introduction.singAlongText: Leave your favorite songs for the community sing-along here!
introduction.themeTitle: Website Theme: Kirin Village Beside the Taipei Basin
theme: At the edge of the Taipei Basin lies a place known as Kirin Village.
It is neither as bright and bustling as the city nor completely isolated from civilization.
Legend says a Kirin once descended here, leaving blessings and protection upon the land.
Every encounter and every story quietly continues that gentle miracle.
build: Don't just be a spectator—be one of the people who make this event shine!
Don't just watch—help this event glow because of you!
Step forward and become part of what makes this event special.
introduction.communityText: The event will feature stage interactions, creator presentations, and themed discussions so everyone can find something to enjoy.
introduction.communityInvite1: Do you have a game, story, creation, or anything you'd like to share?
introduction.communityInvite2: Anyone can take the stage and let others hear their passion and ideas.
introduction.vendorText: The venue will feature booths from creators and fans selling pony-related merchandise and original works.
introduction.vendorInvite1: Creators and artists are welcome to showcase and sell their work.
introduction.vendorInvite2: Let more people discover your creations and add even more color to the event.
introduction.mascotText: This year's mascot symbolizes a place where friendship and creativity gather.
introduction.volunteerText: Volunteers are an essential part of the event, helping with operations, guidance, and support.
introduction.volunteerInvite1: We're looking for passionate people to help create an even better event experience.
invitation: At the edge of the Taipei Basin, a softly glowing invitation drifts through Kirin Village.
It unfolds before your eyes as words appear like light.
invitation2: Whoever you are, if you love My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic!
Whether you're a new fan or a longtime one, regardless of age, gender, or background—this place is for you.
We warmly invite you to step into this land between reality and imagination.
Join this celebration created by pony fans and experience creativity, friendship, and unforgettable encounters.
Let us gather here and write the next chapter together.

coc.title: ✦ Code of Conduct ✦
intro: To ensure every traveler can enjoy the event safely and comfortably, we ask everyone to treat one another with respect, kindness, and inclusiveness.
Please help create a safe, inclusive, and enjoyable environment.
Please follow the rules below and help maintain this welcoming space.
rules: 1. Smoking is prohibited throughout the building. Please smoke outside on the first floor if necessary.
2. Keep all aisles clear to ensure emergency exits remain accessible.
3. Harassment or inappropriate behavior toward other attendees will not be tolerated.
4. Please take care of your belongings. Lost items should be handed to event staff.
5. Please respect the venue and its facilities. Food, drinks, and difficult-to-clean materials are restricted in designated areas.

mascot.title: ✦ Mascot ✦
mascot.guardianText: Hidden within the mist at the edge of the Taipei Basin, she quietly watches over travelers and guides those who lose their way.
basic: Symbol: Friendship, Blessings, and New Beginnings
message: Welcome to Kirin Village. I've been waiting for you.
Fan creations featuring Taoyi are warmly welcomed. Please avoid inappropriate content.
